tasks.label: Commit organization CRUD implementation
tasks.command:
git commit -m "feat: Implement complete Organization CRUD with soft delete and reactivation

- Add is_active field to Organization model with database migration
- Implement backend API endpoints for organization management:
  - POST /api/organizations - Create organization
  - GET /api/organizations - List organizations with pagination, search, and inactive filtering
  - GET /api/organizations/:id - Get organization by ID
  - PUT /api/organizations/:id - Update organization
  - DELETE /api/organizations/:id - Deactivate organization (soft delete)
  - PATCH /api/organizations/:id/reactivate - Reactivate organization
- Add frontend components for organization management:
  - OrganizationManagement.tsx - Main table component with search, status display, and actions
  - organization-form.tsx - Modal form for create/edit operations
- Add organizationService.ts for API calls
- Update lucideMuiAdapter.tsx with required icons (Edit, Trash2)
- Implement role-based access control (ADMIN/MANAGER)
- Add proper error handling and validation
- Support viewing inactive organizations and toggling status"
